format.strings: 6-element array, index 0 = string 1 = low E, index 5 = string 6 = high e. Values: null = muted/not played; 0 = open string (open:true) or at barre reference fret (open:false); positive integer = fret number (open:true) or offset above barre reference fret (open:false).
format.fingers: 6-element array, same indexing. Values: null = muted; 0 = open string (no finger); 1-4 = finger (1=index, 2=middle, 3=ring, 4=pinky); 'T' = thumb over the neck.
format.barre: null, or { finger, fromString, toString } where fromString/toString are 1-indexed (1=low E, 6=high e). Describes which finger lays flat across which string span at the barre reference fret.
format.open: true = open-position chord; match by exact absolute fret values. false = moveable shape; match by normalising the voicing (subtract min fret) and comparing relative offsets.
format.difficulty_hints: semi_barre field flags a barre with one open string inside the span — much harder than a clean barre, should carry a heavy difficulty penalty.

matching.open_true: If any string in the incoming voicing is at absolute fret 0, look only in open:true entries and match strings[] element-for-element (null==null, fret==fret).
matching.open_false: Otherwise compute minFret = min(non-null frets). Subtract minFret from every non-null fret to get a relative pattern. Match against open:false entries on that pattern.
matching.no_match: Fall through to the algorithmic finger-assignment if no entry matches.

shapes.name: E minor
shapes.notes: Some players prefer index+middle (1,2) to keep ring free for Em7 variations.

shapes.name: Em7
shapes.notes: Minimal voicing: only the A string is fretted; D and G strings open provide the minor 7th and minor 3rd.

shapes.name: Emaj7
shapes.notes: D and G strings at same fret: index on D (lower string), middle on G (higher string). Ring then reaches A at fret 2.

shapes.name: A major
shapes.notes: Alternative: barre index across D/G/B strings. Alternative: middle+ring+pinky leaves index free for transitions.

shapes.name: A minor
shapes.notes: Conventional fingering has ring on D and middle on G — opposite of the lower-string/lower-finger rule. Index on B at fret 1 is the anchor.

shapes.name: A7
shapes.notes: D and B at same fret 2: index on D (lower string), middle on B (higher string).

shapes.name: Am7
shapes.notes: Index on B (fret 1), middle on D (fret 2). G and high e open.

shapes.name: Amaj7
shapes.notes: Index on G (fret 1). D and B at fret 2: middle on D (lower string), ring on B (higher string).

shapes.name: D major
shapes.notes: Conventional fingering crosses the lower-string/lower-finger rule: index on high e (fret 2), middle on G (fret 2), ring on B (fret 3). This arch is comfortable and common.

shapes.name: D minor
shapes.notes: Index on high e (fret 1), middle on G (fret 2), ring on B (fret 3).

shapes.name: D7
shapes.notes: Index on B (fret 1). G and high e at fret 2: middle on G (lower string), ring on high e (higher string).

shapes.name: G major
shapes.notes: Ring on low E (fret 3), middle on A (fret 2), pinky on high e (fret 3). Alternative thumb version: T on low E, index on A, middle on high e — frees ring+pinky but requires thumb-over technique.

shapes.name: G7
shapes.notes: Index on high e (fret 1), middle on A (fret 2), ring on low E (fret 3).

shapes.name: C major
shapes.notes: Ring on A (fret 3), middle on D (fret 2), index on B (fret 1). Classic CAGED C shape.

shapes.name: Cmaj7
shapes.notes: C major with B open as the major 7th. Ring on A, middle on D; G, B, high e all open.

shapes.name: C7
shapes.notes: Index on B (fret 1), middle on D (fret 2). A and G both at fret 3: ring on A (lower string), pinky on G (higher string). High e open.

shapes.name: B7
shapes.notes: Index on D (fret 1). A, G, and high e all at fret 2: middle on A (lowest of the three strings), ring on G, pinky on high e. B string open. The middle finger reaching down to A while index is on D is physically unusual but conventional for this chord.

shapes.name: E5 (power chord)
shapes.notes: Low E open, middle on A (fret 2), ring on D (fret 2). G/B/high e muted with fretting-hand palm or simply not struck.

shapes.name: E-shape barre (major)
shapes.notes: Full 6-string barre with index. Middle on G (rel+1), ring on A (rel+2), pinky on D (rel+2). B and high e held by barre. Covers F, F#, G, Ab, A, Bb, B etc.

shapes.name: E-shape barre (minor)
shapes.notes: Full barre. Ring on A (rel+2), pinky on D (rel+2). G, B, high e, low E all held by barre index.

shapes.name: E-shape barre (dom7)
shapes.notes: Full barre. Middle on G (rel+1), ring on A (rel+2). D string at barre fret (minor 7th) held by index barre.

shapes.name: E-shape barre (maj7)
shapes.notes: Full barre. D and G both at rel+1: index(barre) covers everything at rel 0; middle on D (rel+1, lower string), ring on G (rel+1, higher string); pinky on A (rel+2).

shapes.name: A-shape barre (major)
shapes.notes: Low E muted (or optionally sounded as the 5th if it falls on a chord tone). 5-string barre with index across strings 2-6. Middle, ring, pinky on D/G/B at rel+2. Alternative: ring-finger barre across D/G/B leaving index free.

shapes.name: A-shape barre (minor)
shapes.notes: 5-string barre. Middle on B (rel+1), ring on D (rel+2), pinky on G (rel+2). A and high e held by barre.

shapes.name: A-shape barre (dom7)
shapes.notes: 5-string barre. A, G, high e held by index at barre fret. Middle on D (rel+2), ring on B (rel+2).

shapes.name: A-shape barre (min7)
shapes.notes: 5-string barre. A, G, high e held by index. Middle on B (rel+1), ring on D (rel+2).

shapes.name: A-shape barre (maj7)
shapes.notes: 5-string barre. Index holds A and high e. Middle on G (rel+1). D and B at rel+2: ring on D (lower string), pinky on B (higher string).

shapes.name: D-shape barre (major)
shapes.notes: 4-string mini-barre with index across D/G/B/high-e. Middle on G (rel+2), ring on high e (rel+2), pinky on B (rel+3). Low E and A muted. Works cleanly above fret 5.

shapes.name: Power chord (2-string)
shapes.notes: Index on low string (root), ring on next string (5th). Middle finger kept free — allows quick pinky reach for fills. G/B/high e muted by fretting hand.

shapes.name: Power chord with octave (3-string)
shapes.notes: Index on root, ring on 5th (str+1), pinky on octave (str+2). Both upper strings at rel+2: ring on the lower (str+1), pinky on the higher (str+2).
